symptoms: Excessive vibration on drive-end bearing housing; abnormal noise resembling grinding; motor body temperature 15°C above baseline
root_cause: Drive-end deep groove ball bearing (6310-2RS) suffered raceway spalling due to contaminated lubricant and overloading at 110% rated current
corrective_action: Replaced drive-end bearing SP-001. Flushed lubrication system, refilled with fresh EP-220. Realigned motor-to-conveyor coupling. Motor current reduced by adjusting VFD parameters.

symptoms: Belt mistracking towards drive side; edge fraying visible; belt slipping at drive pulley
root_cause: Drive pulley lagging worn out causing belt slip; combined with misalignment of return idlers at tail end leading to progressive tracking failure
corrective_action: Replaced drive pulley rubber lagging. Realigned return idlers. Adjusted take-up tension. Belt edge trimmed and cold-vulcanized.

symptoms: Mechanical seal leaking at rate of 15 drops/min; shaft vibration elevated 4x baseline; suction cavitation noise
root_cause: Mechanical seal face worn due to abrasive particles in cooling water. Cavitation caused by partially blocked suction strainer reducing NPSH available below required value.
corrective_action: Replaced double mechanical seal SP-008. Cleaned suction strainer. Checked and repaired check valve. Added inline strainer with finer mesh.

symptoms: Tuyere #7 showing water leak; shell temperature spike at tuyere zone; irregular blast distribution
root_cause: Copper tuyere fatigue cracking from thermal cycling and molten iron splash. Coolant ingress into furnace causing hydrogen generation risk.
corrective_action: Emergency shutdown of blast to tuyere #7. Replaced copper tuyere SP-006 under hot repair procedure. Blast resumed after 6-hour cure period.

symptoms: Gear oil temperature 35°C above normal; metallic particles found in oil sample; stage 1 pinion bearing noise
root_cause: Lubrication failure due to oil pump filter blockage reducing oil flow to stage-1 bearings by 60%. Bearing surface fatigue accelerated resulting in micro-pitting on gear teeth.
corrective_action: Replaced oil pump filter. Full oil drain and flush with flushing oil. Refilled with fresh EP-220. Gear tooth inspection by borescope — minor pitting only, no crack. Monitoring intervals reduced.

symptoms: Carbon brush sparking at commutator; armature winding insulation resistance dropped to 0.8 MΩ; burn marks on commutator segments
root_cause: Carbon brush wear beyond minimum contact length causing arcing. Commutator surface contamination from hydraulic oil mist in motor enclosure.
corrective_action: Replaced full carbon brush set SP-003. Commutator surface dressed on lathe and polished. Motor enclosure sealed. VFD parameters verified.

symptoms: Cooling tower approach temperature degraded by 8°C; fan amperage increased 15%; white scale deposits on fill media
root_cause: Fill media fouled with calcium carbonate scaling and biological growth (legionella risk assessment conducted). Reduced heat transfer efficiency.
corrective_action: Replaced fill media packs SP-010. Biocide shock treatment and pH correction. Blowdown rate increased. Water treatment dosing pump recalibrated.

symptoms: Surface defects (scabs and laps) on rolled strip; work roll surface showing spalling over 200mm barrel length; mill vibration increased
root_cause: Work roll spalling initiated from subsurface crack due to thermal shock from water spray failure on roll cooling header. Crack propagated during high-load rolling pass.
corrective_action: Immediate roll change. Replaced work rolls SP-013. Inspected and repaired roll cooling headers. Roll change scheduled for 500-tonne intervals.

symptoms: Abnormal vibration at fan shaft — 12 mm/s RMS vs 2.5 normal; imbalance frequency prominent in spectrum
root_cause: Fan blade erosion on suction side from particulate abrasion causing dynamic imbalance. Balance weight correction insufficient due to progressive blade erosion.
corrective_action: Fan shut down for dynamic balancing. Eroded blade surface welded and reground. Full dynamic balance achieved to ISO G2.5. Vibration returned to 2.1 mm/s.

symptoms: Abnormal jaw plate wear rate — 40% faster than expected; throughput reduced 25%; product size distribution shifted coarser
root_cause: Feed material hardness increased beyond design specification (Wi = 18 vs design 14 kWh/t). Jaw plates experiencing abrasive wear on lower cheek area.
corrective_action: Replaced both fixed and swing jaw plates SP-017, SP-018. Adjusted CSS to 90mm to reduce load. Crusher feed rate limited to 85% capacity until metallurgical review complete.

symptoms: Differential pressure across filter bags elevated to 2.8 kPa (normal 1.2 kPa); outlet PM10 readings exceeding permitted limit
root_cause: Filter bags blinded with fine ore dust cake that could not be cleaned by pulse-jet cycle due to increased pulse interval timer misconfig.
corrective_action: Reconfigured pulse timer to design interval of 60 seconds. Manual offline cleaning of 24 bags. 6 damaged bags replaced SP-019.

symptoms: Pump discharge pressure dropped 18%; flow rate reduced by 22%; impeller noise during operation
root_cause: Impeller wear ring clearance exceeded 2x design tolerance due to erosion from fine sand particles in cooling water. Pump operating below BEP causing recirculation.
corrective_action: Pump disassembled. Impeller SP-009 replaced. Casing wear ring replaced. Pump performance curve test completed and verified.

symptoms: Belt joint failure at splice; sudden belt stop; material spillage at discharge end
root_cause: Cold-vulcanized belt splice delamination after 18 months service. Splice location had been under tension from misaligned take-up arrangement.
corrective_action: Emergency hot-vulcanized splice performed on belt. Take-up carriage alignment corrected. Belt tension readjusted per conveyor design specification.

symptoms: High oil temperature alarm at 95°C (trip set at 100°C); oil cooler fan running but no temperature reduction; oil analysis showing elevated Fe content 420 ppm
root_cause: Oil cooler fouled externally with scale and dust reducing airflow 50%. Iron content from gear tooth micro-pitting following previous lubrication event.
corrective_action: Oil cooler cleaned. Oil changed with analysis-recommended high-viscosity EP-320 grade. Vibration signature monitored — acceptable. Gear tooth inspection scheduled.

symptoms: Motor winding temperature 88°C exceeding Class F limit; thermal protection relay tripped; motor stopped without warning
root_cause: Cooling fan on motor shaft had blade broken causing reduced airflow over motor body. Combined with increased load from belt tensioning issue.
corrective_action: Motor cooling fan replaced. Motor rewound for Class H insulation as OEM cooling fan unavailable. Belt tension corrected on Conveyor C7.

symptoms: Hanging and slipping of burden; irregular gas distribution; top gas CO2/CO ratio deviation; excessive coke rate
root_cause: Scaffold formation at bosh level due to sticky burden from high-alkali coke batch. Uneven burden distribution accelerating refractory erosion at one wall.
corrective_action: Blast throttling and burden correction with low-alkali coke. Gouge injection to break scaffold. Burden profiling adjusted to center charging pattern.

symptoms: Mill chatter vibration at 11 Hz; strip thickness variation beyond ±0.05mm tolerance; surface marks periodic every 1.8m on strip
root_cause: Roll eccentricity on backup roll No.2 generating forced vibration matching mill natural frequency. Chatter amplified by worn spindle coupling.
corrective_action: Backup roll SP-014 replaced. Spindle coupling rebuilt. Mill chatter model recalibrated. Roll grinding specification tightened to 0.003mm TIR.

symptoms: Cooling tower fan motor tripped on overload; cooling tower basin level rising; return water temperature 6°C above setpoint
root_cause: Cooling tower fan blade set imbalanced after blade crack repair failure. Motor overcurrent from mechanical overload.
corrective_action: Fan blade set replaced SP-011. Motor thermally checked and declared healthy. Tower balance test completed. Motor protection relay reset.

symptoms: Shaft bearing temperature alarm at 85°C (normal 45°C); vibration step change from 2.1 to 6.8 mm/s; oil sight glass showing foam
root_cause: Spherical roller bearing outer race cracking from previous overloading event. Oil foaming caused by water ingress through worn lip seal.
corrective_action: Fan bearing SP-012 replaced on both drive and non-drive ends. Oil seal replaced. Fresh oil added after flushing. Fan run-up verification completed.

symptoms: Shaft vibration alarm; coupling guard getting hot; coupling rattle noise at startup
root_cause: Shaft misalignment between pump and motor after baseplate settlement. Flexible coupling insert worn beyond 60% allowing metal-to-metal contact.
corrective_action: Laser alignment performed — angular and parallel errors corrected to 0.02mm/100mm. Coupling insert replaced. Baseplate re-grouted.

symptoms: Oil seal leaking at output shaft; oil puddle on gearbox pedestal; output shaft lateral runout 0.4mm
root_cause: Output shaft lip seal hardened due to oil oxidation from over-temperature events. Shaft runout contributing to eccentric seal loading.
corrective_action: Output shaft oil seal replaced SP-015. Shaft runout checked — acceptable at 0.08mm after bearing adjustment. Oil seal housing groove polished.

symptoms: Non-drive end bearing running rough; vibration velocity 8.2 mm/s at NDE housing; high-frequency ringing on vibration spectrum
root_cause: NDE cylindrical roller bearing (NU314) cage fracture due to fatigue. Fractured cage pieces causing roller skewing and high-frequency impacts.
corrective_action: Motor pulled down. NDE bearing SP-002 replaced. Drive-end bearing inspected — healthy. Motor reassembled and realigned. Baseline vibration recorded 1.8 mm/s.

symptoms: Tail pulley bearing seized; conveyor stopped; smell of burning rubber from seized pulley area
root_cause: Tail pulley bearing water contamination from washing water ingress. Lubricant washed out leading to boundary lubrication and finally seizure.
corrective_action: Tail pulley removed and bearings replaced. Pulley housing sealed and regreased. Water shield added to tail section. Bearing regreasing schedule changed to monthly.

symptoms: Catastrophic gear noise; metal on metal grinding; gearbox vibration 45 mm/s; rolling mill trip on torque overload
root_cause: Stage-1 helical gear tooth fracture from root fatigue crack propagation. Crack initiated from previous micro-pitting region not detected during borescope inspection.
corrective_action: Emergency shutdown. Gearbox disassembled — stage-1 gear pair confirmed fractured. Replacement gear SP-016 on order (120 day lead time). Interim: rolling mill operating at 40% capacity with temporary gear set.

symptoms: Stave cooler #12 showing reduced coolant flow; refractory thermocouple TZ-12 reading 380°C vs normal 180°C; shell temperature hotspot visible by IR camera
root_cause: Refractory lining erosion at bosh zone exposing stave cooler to molten slag attack. Stave coolant channel partially blocked by slag solidification reducing cooling by 40%.
corrective_action: Emergency gunning repair of eroded bosh zone with alumina-SiC castable. Stave coolant flow restored by acid flush of blocked channels. Blast volume reduced 15% for 48h post-repair. Long-term: reline scheduled at next planned shutdown.
